description: The Closest Point On Cone Surface node takes in the cone parameters (size and rotation) and a provided point to check. Then it returns the closest point on that cone's surface and if that point is within that cone's defined parameters.

fields.ConeCenter: The center of the cone (located at the center of the base of the cone).
fields.ConeBaseRadius: The size of the cone base's circle radius.
fields.ClosestPoint: Returns the point in the cone's surface compared with the point given.
fields.IsPointInside: Returns if the point is within this cone.
